essence: Installs and maintains automation equipment, PLCs, and control systems that run production lines.

identity.title: Automation Technician
identity.summary: Supports automated production by wiring, commissioning, and troubleshooting control systems and sensors.

salary.notes: Technicians with PLC programming and network skills are in high demand.

qualifications: Apprenticeship or NVQ in electrical or control engineering
Experience with PLCs, HMIs, and industrial networks
Ability to read electrical schematics and perform wiring
Knowledge of safety and commissioning procedures

lifestyle.description: Hands‑on role in factories and plants; often shift work with on‑call responsibilities for breakdowns and commissioning.

habits: Programs basic PLC logic and configures HMIs
Documents changes and updates maintenance records
